question: The chart displays the energy consumption of several departments. Based on this data, which of the following statements is correct?

options.A: Logistics uses less energy than R&D.
options.B: Manufacturing has the highest energy consumption among all the departments shown.
options.C: R&D uses nearly four times as much energy as IT.
options.D: IT and Packaging use the same amount of energy.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
